results.title: Precision BioSciences to Host Investor Webcast to Discuss Late-Breaking PBGENE-HBV Data from ELIMINATE-B Trial Presented at European Association for the Study of the Liver Congress 2026
results.description: Precision BioSciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: DTIL), a clinical stage gene editing company utilizing its novel proprietary ARCUS® platform to develop in vivo gene editing therapies for high unmet need diseases, today announced that it will host an investor webcast to discuss new biopsy and clinical data from the ongoing Phase 1 ELIMINATE-B trial. The presentation will include new clinical data along with late-breaker biopsy data featured at the European Association for the Study of the Liver (EASL)
